channel.title: summarizedStoriesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. accuses China of "industrial-scale" campaigns to steal AI secrets
item.description: The Trump administration on Thursday accused China-backed actors of running "deliberate, industrial-scale campaigns" to distill and copy American fron...

item.title: RFK Jr.'s peptide push could become next wellness boom
item.description: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s new push to loosen federal restrictions on peptides could be a bonanza for telehealth companies, compounding ...

item.title: DOJ watchdog launches review of agency’s compliance with Epstein files law
item.description: The audit by the department’s inspector general follows months of lawmaker complaints over the congressionally mandated release of investigative files...

item.title: Trump unveils new drug price deal with Regeneron amid affordability push
item.description: The drug company is the 17th to agree to lower its prices as part of the administration’s Most Favored Nation initiative. It will make a new gene ther...

item.title: U.S. sailor en route to Strait of Hormuz sidelined by monkey attack
item.description: A U.S. Navy sailor assigned to a minesweeping ship that's headed to the Strait of Hormuz was medically evacuated to his home port after he was scratch...

item.title: Iran deploys more mines in the Strait of Hormuz, sources say
item.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) navy laid more mines in the Strait of Hormuz this week, according to a U.S. official and a source with...

item.title: Scoop: Trump reclassifies medical marijuana
item.description: President Trump's acting attorney general ordered the immediate reclassification of FDA-approved and state-licensed marijuana as a less dangerous drug...

item.title: Trump officials reclassify medical marijuana as lower-risk drug
item.description: The Justice Department said the drug will now be listed on Schedule III, similar to some common prescription painkillers. The order does not decrimina...

item.title: Here are Virginia’s new congressional districts and who is running
item.description: Some House races are newly competitive, and four Republican incumbents are now endangered.

item.title: ‘FBoy Island’ contestant’s bet on his own Senate bid exposes perils of Kalshi
item.description: A former reality TV contestant turned candidate in Virginia and two U.S. House hopefuls in Texas and Minnesota have been banned from the prediction ma...

item.title: Canada’s prime minister says economic ties with US are a weakness that must be corrected
item.description: “We have to take care of ourselves because we can’t rely on one foreign partner,” Mark Carney said in a video address. “We can’t control the disruptio...

item.title: Trump Keeps Gambling With the Economy — And Getting Away With It
item.description: President Donald Trump has taken one risk after another that could have destabilized the American economy. Iran is the latest crisis to test U.S. econ...

item.title: Capitol agenda: GOP bets on immigration fight, not big bills
Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
